name: python3-pip-whl
title: python3-pip-whl
description:
Python package installer (pip wheel)
pip is the Python package installer.  It integrates with virtualenv, doesn't
do partial installs, can save package state for replaying, can install from
non-egg sources, and can install from version control repositories.
.
This is the support package for the PEP 427 wheel version of the package,
required for using pip inside a virtual environment.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pip-whl because Python package installer (pip wheel).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pip-whl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pip-whl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pip-whl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
